w:r.w:t: Yes. For students, the explanation should be
for each module so they can understand what they are building.
is a seller who sells products on an online marketplace.
One marketplace contains thousands of vendors.
Instead of managing products manually, the system manages vendors automatically.
Marketplace means a website where many vendors sell products.
FastAPI is used to build APIs.
Docker packages the complete project into one container.
GitHub Actions automates project testing and deployment.
Business Intelligence (BI) Dashboard is the main screen where business users monitor company performance.
It combines all important metrics in one place.
Managers can quickly identify trends and make better business decisions without reading raw tables.
This progression helps students see how each technology fits into the complete
, from vendor onboarding through analytics, machine learning, and deployment.
